sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41158" key="e)pisuntre/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισυν-τρέχω</orth>, <sense id="n41158.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">run together</tr_> to a place, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg002.perseus-grc1:9:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Marc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
